response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'ココロパズルリズム' and performer Jofutei Ririden from on-screen credits. 2. Performed search for 'ココロパズルリズム' to confirm artist (SMAP) and get lyrics. 3. Defined scene boundaries based on visual changes (performance vs. talk). 4. Mapped lyrics to the performance scene and constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A video performance featuring Jofutei Ririden singing a cover of SMAP's 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm', followed by a post-performance talk segment in an art studio.

scenes.description: The performer, Jofutei Ririden, dances and sings the song 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm'. The screen behind her displays the song title and puzzle-themed visuals. The song concludes around 04:39.

scenes.description: The song ends, and the scene shifts to an art studio. Jofutei Ririden stands in front of a painting, waving and talking to the audience.
